proposed_hypotheses.text: Cell lines with `braf_v600e=1` have more negative `dependency_BRAF` scores than cell lines with `braf_v600e=0`.
Cell lines with `egfr_amplification=1` have more negative `dependency_EGFR` scores than cell lines with `egfr_amplification=0`.
Cell lines with `erbb2_amplification=1` have more negative `dependency_ERBB2` scores than cell lines with `erbb2_amplification=0`.
Cell lines with `kras_mutation=1` have more negative `dependency_KRAS` scores than cell lines with `kras_mutation=0`.

analyses.code: Welch t-test comparing dependency_BRAF by braf_v600e status.
analyses.result_summary: Mean `dependency_BRAF` was -0.804698 in `braf_v600e=1` lines (n=5574) versus -0.249503 in `braf_v600e=0` lines (n=44426).

analyses.code: Welch t-test comparing dependency_EGFR by egfr_amplification status.
analyses.result_summary: Mean `dependency_EGFR` was -0.601046 in `egfr_amplification=1` lines (n=3880) versus -0.252407 otherwise (n=46120).

analyses.code: Welch t-test comparing dependency_ERBB2 by erbb2_amplification status.
analyses.result_summary: Mean `dependency_ERBB2` was -0.685595 in `erbb2_amplification=1` lines (n=4890) versus -0.253473 otherwise (n=45110).

analyses.code: Welch t-test comparing dependency_KRAS by kras_mutation status.
analyses.result_summary: Mean `dependency_KRAS` was -0.559415 in `kras_mutation=1` lines (n=11842) versus -0.251959 otherwise (n=38158).

proposed_hypotheses.text: Among `braf_v600e=1` cell lines, `lineage=skin` has more negative `dependency_BRAF` scores than non-skin `braf_v600e=1` cell lines.
Among `erbb2_amplification=1` cell lines, `lineage_subtype=her2_enriched` has more negative `dependency_ERBB2` scores than other ERBB2-amplified cell lines.
Among `kras_mutation=1` cell lines, `lineage=pancreatic` has more negative `dependency_KRAS` scores than non-pancreatic KRAS-mutant cell lines.
Among `egfr_amplification=1` cell lines, `lineage=brain` has more negative `dependency_EGFR` scores than non-brain EGFR-amplified cell lines.

analyses.code: Welch t-test within braf_v600e=1 lines, skin versus non-skin.
analyses.result_summary: Within BRAF V600E lines, skin lineage averaged -0.811388 versus -0.801053 in non-skin lines; the small -0.010335 difference was not significant.

analyses.code: Welch t-test within erbb2_amplification=1 lines, her2_enriched versus other subtypes.
analyses.result_summary: Within ERBB2-amplified lines, HER2-enriched subtype averaged -0.752521 versus -0.683593 in other subtypes, supporting stronger ERBB2 dependency in this subgroup.

analyses.code: Welch t-test within kras_mutation=1 lines, pancreatic versus non-pancreatic.
analyses.result_summary: Within KRAS-mutant lines, pancreatic lineage averaged -0.559098 versus -0.559518 in non-pancreatic lines; the effect was essentially zero.

analyses.code: Welch t-test within egfr_amplification=1 lines, brain versus non-brain.
analyses.result_summary: Within EGFR-amplified lines, brain lineage averaged -0.611669 versus -0.598221 in non-brain lines; the -0.013448 difference was not significant.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Cell lines with `nf1_loss=1` have more negative `dependency_RIT1` scores than cell lines with `nf1_loss=0`.
The `lineage=brain` and `nf1_loss=1` combination has an extra negative interaction on `dependency_RIT1`, making brain NF1-loss cell lines more RIT1-dependent than expected from either feature alone.

analyses.code: Welch t-test comparing dependency_RIT1 by nf1_loss status.
analyses.result_summary: Mean `dependency_RIT1` was -0.352716 in `nf1_loss=1` lines (n=4560) versus -0.257196 in `nf1_loss=0` lines (n=45440).

analyses.code: Saturated 2x2 interaction coefficient: mean11 - mean10 - mean01 + mean00 for lineage=brain and nf1_loss.
analyses.result_summary: The `lineage=brain` by `nf1_loss=1` interaction coefficient for `dependency_RIT1` was -0.058229; brain/NF1-loss lines averaged -0.404687, compared with -0.348675 for non-brain NF1-loss lines.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Cell lines with `lineage=colorectal` have more negative `dependency_KIF18A` scores than non-colorectal cell lines.
Cell lines with `apc_mutation=1` have more negative `dependency_KIF18A` scores than cell lines with `apc_mutation=0`.
Cell lines with `wnt_activity_score>=0.819` have more negative `dependency_KIF18A` scores than cell lines below that threshold.
The `lineage=colorectal` and `apc_mutation=1` combination has an extra negative interaction on `dependency_KIF18A`, indicating a concentrated colorectal APC-mutant KIF18A dependency.

analyses.code: Welch t-test comparing dependency_KIF18A by lineage=colorectal.
analyses.result_summary: Colorectal lines averaged -0.720354 for `dependency_KIF18A` versus -0.252397 in all other lineages.

analyses.code: Welch t-test comparing dependency_KIF18A by apc_mutation status.
analyses.result_summary: APC-mutant lines averaged -0.544702 for `dependency_KIF18A` versus -0.252583 in APC-wild-type lines.

analyses.code: Welch t-test comparing dependency_KIF18A by top-quartile wnt_activity_score threshold 0.819.
analyses.result_summary: High-WNT lines averaged -0.469402 for `dependency_KIF18A` versus -0.252593 in the rest.

analyses.code: Saturated 2x2 interaction coefficient for lineage=colorectal and apc_mutation on dependency_KIF18A.
analyses.result_summary: The colorectal by APC-mutant interaction coefficient was -0.682214; the joint subgroup averaged -0.942531, while the other cells in the 2x2 table were near -0.25 to -0.26.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Cell lines satisfying the complete subgroup `lineage=colorectal AND apc_mutation=1 AND wnt_activity_score>=0.819` have much more negative `dependency_KIF18A` scores than all other cell lines, while dropping any one of those predicates suppresses the dependency.

analyses.code: Welch t-test for dependency_KIF18A in the triple subgroup versus all other rows.
analyses.result_summary: The complete colorectal/APC-mutant/high-WNT subgroup averaged -1.111866 for `dependency_KIF18A` (n=3133) versus -0.253014 in all other lines, a -0.858852 effect.

analyses.code: Descriptive check of KIF18A means after removing each triple-subgroup predicate.
analyses.result_summary: Inside colorectal lines, APC-mutant but not-high-WNT averaged -0.272673, noAPC high-WNT averaged -0.271825, and noAPC not-high-WNT averaged -0.248369; outside colorectal, APC-mutant/high-WNT averaged -0.252815. The strong dependency is enabled only by the full triple definition.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Cell lines with `myc_amplification=1` have more negative `dependency_RPL11` scores than cell lines with `myc_amplification=0`.
Cell lines with `copy_number_8q24>=0.428` have more negative `dependency_RPL11` scores than cell lines below that threshold.
Cell lines with `rnaseq_MYC_log2_tpm>=5.669` have more negative `dependency_DHX9` scores than cell lines below that threshold.

analyses.code: Welch t-test comparing dependency_RPL11 by myc_amplification status.
analyses.result_summary: MYC-amplified lines averaged -0.361392 for `dependency_RPL11` versus -0.252335 in non-amplified lines.

analyses.code: Welch t-test comparing dependency_RPL11 by top-quartile copy_number_8q24 threshold 0.428.
analyses.result_summary: High-8q24 copy-number lines averaged -0.343967 for `dependency_RPL11` versus -0.245214 in the rest.

analyses.code: Welch t-test comparing dependency_DHX9 by top-quartile rnaseq_MYC_log2_tpm threshold 5.669.
analyses.result_summary: High-MYC-RNA lines averaged -0.355124 for `dependency_DHX9` versus -0.326514 in the rest.

proposed_hypotheses.text: A one-standard-deviation increase in `growth_rate_doublings_per_day` is associated with more negative `dependency_POLR2A` scores after adjusting for `cas9_activity_score`, `media_serum_pct`, `screen_batch`, and `culture_type`.

A one-standard-deviation increase in `growth_rate_doublings_per_day` is associated with more negative `dependency_TMED10` scores after adjusting for `cas9_activity_score`, `media_serum_pct`, `screen_batch`, and `culture_type`.
A one-standard-deviation increase in `cas9_activity_score` is associated with more negative `dependency_TMED10` scores after adjusting for growth, serum, batch, and culture covariates.

analyses.code: OLS: dependency_POLR2A ~ growth_z + cas9_z + media_z + screen_batch + culture_type.
analyses.result_summary: Adjusted OLS estimated -0.061204 lower `dependency_POLR2A` per 1 SD higher growth rate.

analyses.code: OLS: dependency_TMED10 ~ growth_z + cas9_z + media_z + screen_batch + culture_type.
analyses.result_summary: Adjusted OLS estimated -0.020302 lower `dependency_TMED10` per 1 SD higher growth rate.

analyses.code: OLS: dependency_TMED10 ~ growth_z + cas9_z + media_z + screen_batch + culture_type.
analyses.result_summary: Adjusted OLS estimated -0.012438 lower `dependency_TMED10` per 1 SD higher Cas9 activity.

proposed_hypotheses.text: In a systematic single- and two-predicate subgroup scan, the strongest negative `dependency_BRAF` subgroup is defined by `braf_v600e=1`.
In a systematic single- and two-predicate subgroup scan, the strongest negative `dependency_EGFR` subgroup is defined by `egfr_amplification=1`.
In a systematic single- and two-predicate subgroup scan, the strongest negative `dependency_ERBB2` subgroup is defined by `erbb2_amplification=1`.
In a systematic single- and two-predicate subgroup scan, the strongest negative `dependency_KRAS` subgroup is defined by `kras_mutation=1`.

In a systematic single- and two-predicate subgroup scan, the strongest negative `dependency_RIT1` subgroup is primarily defined by `nf1_loss=1`, with `lineage=brain AND nf1_loss=1` as a smaller, more negative subgroup.

analyses.screen_details: Scanned 72 single predicates and all two-predicate intersections with n>=200.
analyses.result_summary: The BRAF scan was dominated by `braf_v600e=1`; mean difference was -0.555195 versus all other rows. Two-predicate variants did not materially improve the effect.

analyses.screen_details: Scanned 72 single predicates and all two-predicate intersections with n>=200.
analyses.result_summary: The EGFR scan was dominated by `egfr_amplification=1`; mean difference was -0.348638 versus all other rows.

analyses.screen_details: Scanned 72 single predicates and all two-predicate intersections with n>=200.
analyses.result_summary: The ERBB2 scan was dominated by `erbb2_amplification=1`; mean difference was -0.432122 versus all other rows.

analyses.screen_details: Scanned 72 single predicates and all two-predicate intersections with n>=200.
analyses.result_summary: The KRAS scan was dominated by `kras_mutation=1`; mean difference was -0.307456 versus all other rows.

analyses.screen_details: Scanned 72 single predicates and all two-predicate intersections with n>=200.
analyses.result_summary: The RIT1 scan found `nf1_loss=1` as the main subgroup (effect -0.095520, p=1.553e-68). The smaller `lineage=brain AND nf1_loss=1` subgroup averaged -0.404687 and had a brain-by-NF1 interaction of -0.058229.

proposed_hypotheses.text: In a systematic single- and two-predicate subgroup scan, `lineage=colorectal AND apc_mutation=1` is the strongest two-predicate negative subgroup for `dependency_KIF18A`.

In a systematic single- and two-predicate subgroup scan, `lineage_subtype=luminal AND stk11_loss=1` has more negative `dependency_TMED10` scores than all other lines, although the effect is small and based on a small subgroup.
In a systematic single- and two-predicate subgroup scan, `lineage_subtype=squamous AND rnaseq_MYC_log2_tpm>=5.669` has more negative `dependency_DHX9` scores than all other lines.
In a systematic single- and two-predicate subgroup scan, `lineage_subtype=her2_enriched AND growth_rate_doublings_per_day>=0.964` has more negative `dependency_POLR2A` scores than all other lines.
In a systematic single- and two-predicate subgroup scan, `myc_amplification=1 AND growth_rate_doublings_per_day>=0.964` has more negative `dependency_RPL11` scores than all other lines.

analyses.screen_details: Scanned 72 single predicates and all two-predicate intersections with n>=200.
analyses.result_summary: `lineage=colorectal AND apc_mutation=1` averaged -0.942531 for `dependency_KIF18A` (n=3925) versus -0.2526 in the rest, effect -0.6899.

analyses.screen_details: Scanned 72 single predicates and all two-predicate intersections with n>=200.
analyses.result_summary: `lineage_subtype=luminal AND stk11_loss=1` averaged -0.308 for `dependency_TMED10` (n=243) versus about -0.254 in the rest, effect -0.0541; this is weaker and less robust than the driver/subgroup effects for other outcomes.

analyses.screen_details: Scanned 72 single predicates and all two-predicate intersections with n>=200.
analyses.result_summary: `lineage_subtype=squamous AND rnaseq_MYC_log2_tpm>=5.669` averaged -0.398 for `dependency_DHX9` (n=585) versus about -0.333 in the rest, effect -0.0656.

analyses.screen_details: Scanned 72 single predicates and all two-predicate intersections with n>=200.
analyses.result_summary: `lineage_subtype=her2_enriched AND growth_rate_doublings_per_day>=0.964` averaged -0.536 for `dependency_POLR2A` (n=252) versus about -0.418 in the rest, effect -0.1174.

analyses.screen_details: Scanned 72 single predicates and all two-predicate intersections with n>=200.
analyses.result_summary: `myc_amplification=1 AND growth_rate_doublings_per_day>=0.964` averaged -0.394 for `dependency_RPL11` (n=2557) versus about -0.263 in the rest, effect -0.1303.

proposed_hypotheses.text: After adjusting for growth, Cas9 activity, serum, screen batch, and culture type, `myc_amplification=1` and `copy_number_8q24>=0.428` each independently make `dependency_RPL11` more negative.
After adjusting for growth, Cas9 activity, serum, screen batch, and culture type, `rnaseq_MYC_log2_tpm>=5.669` makes `dependency_DHX9` more negative.
After adjusting for Cas9 activity, serum, screen batch, and culture type, a one-standard-deviation increase in `growth_rate_doublings_per_day` makes `dependency_POLR2A` more negative.

After adjusting for growth, Cas9 activity, serum, screen batch, and culture type, `nf1_loss=1` has only a small negative association with `dependency_TMED10` compared with the stronger driver effects seen for other dependencies.

analyses.code: OLS: dependency_RPL11 ~ myc_amplification + high_8q24 + growth_z + cas9_z + media_z + screen_batch + culture_type.
analyses.result_summary: In the joint RPL11 model, `myc_amplification=1` retained an independent -0.047157 association with `dependency_RPL11`.

analyses.code: Same OLS model as above.
analyses.result_summary: In the same joint RPL11 model, `copy_number_8q24>=0.428` retained an independent -0.066766 association with `dependency_RPL11`.

analyses.code: OLS: dependency_DHX9 ~ high_MYC_RNA + growth_z + cas9_z + media_z + screen_batch + culture_type.
analyses.result_summary: High MYC RNA retained an adjusted -0.027339 association with `dependency_DHX9`.

analyses.code: OLS: dependency_POLR2A ~ growth_z + cas9_z + media_z + screen_batch + culture_type.
analyses.result_summary: A one-SD higher growth rate retained an adjusted -0.061204 association with `dependency_POLR2A`.

analyses.code: OLS: dependency_TMED10 ~ growth_high + nf1_loss + growth_z + cas9_z + media_z + screen_batch + culture_type.
analyses.result_summary: `nf1_loss=1` retained a small adjusted -0.013411 association with `dependency_TMED10`; the magnitude was far below the canonical oncogene and KIF18A subgroup effects.
